name: TARC Limited
summary: Anant Raj Global Limited operates in the real estate business in India. The company engages in lease rentals of its assets, project sales, and trading of land parcels. Its property portfolio includes residential, mall and retail, hospitality, commercial and IT, and industrial properties. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Gurugram, India. Anant Raj Global Limited (BSE:543249) operates independently of Anant Raj Limited as of August 25, 2020.
